nodes.name: Pacific parakeet
nodes.summary: Pacific parakeet（Pacific parakeet，学名 Psittacara strenuus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Gallery forest，常见栖息地包括灌丛、沼泽。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: Gallery forest
nodes.summary: Gallery forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、黑額鳴冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits a variety of woodland landscapes including deciduous, semi-deciduous, and evergreen; gallery forest; swamp forest; and arid scrublands

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits a variety of woodland landscapes including deciduous, semi-deciduous, and evergreen; gallery forest; swamp forest; and arid scrublands

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits a variety of woodland landscapes including deciduous, semi-deciduous, and evergreen; gallery forest; swamp forest; and arid scrublands
